items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for confirmation messages.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of a specific confirmation message format, but the evidence provided does not include concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this requirement is satisfied. While the linked use case outlines the expected confirmation message, there is no evidence of the actual implementation or mechanisms that generate this message, leading to an inconclusive status regarding requirement coverage.
